events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed: this is a fail — aluminum conductor landed on a device not rated CO/ALR is a termination-compatibility violation (NEC 110.14(A)), a fire-risk defect from thermal expansion/oxidation-driven loose connections, not just a sizing issue under Table 310.16. Written to `/app/answer.json` with risk `high`, required corrective actions (replace with CO/ALR-rated device or use a listed Al-Cu transition connector), and re-inspection before closeout/energization.
